visual_analysis: The design of the application is clean and modern, with a pleasing color palette that enhances visual appeal. The layout is organized, allowing users to easily navigate and understand the functionality, although minor adjustments could improve density and reduce empty space.
educational_analysis: The educational content is clearly presented, with a straightforward description of dynamic arrays. The visual elements, such as the array representation and interactive buttons, support the teaching of the concept effectively, promoting an engaging learning experience.
